MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Central Station'}) RETURN s
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 'P123'}) SET p.email = 'new.email@example.com' RETURN p
MATCH (t:Train {status: 'Retired'}) DELETE t
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE p.name = 'Alice Smith' RETURN t
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route {name: 'Express Line'}) RETURN s.name, t.id
MATCH (st:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot {location: 'North'}) RETURN st.name, st.role
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE i.severity = 'High' AND i.timestamp > '2024-01-01' RETURN i.description, r.name
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HAS_CARD]->(c:TravelCard) WHERE c.expiryDate < '2024-06-01' RETURN p.name, c.id
MATCH (j:Journey)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket) WHERE j.date = '2024-03-24' RETURN count(t) AS totalTickets
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'King\'s Cross'})<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) MATCH (t)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) RETURN t.id, m.details, m.date ORDER BY m.date DESC
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:FOLLOWS]-(t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH r, count(DISTINCT s) AS stopCount WHERE stopCount > 10 RETURN r.name, stopCount
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE r.name = 'Coastal Way' RETURN DISTINCT p.name
MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:HAS_INCIDENT]-(i:Incident) RETURN s.name, count(i) AS incidentCount ORDER BY incidentCount DESC
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, sum(t.price) AS totalSpent WHERE totalSpent > 500 RETURN p.name, totalSpent
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:FOR_TRAIN]->(t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station {name: 'Manchester'}) RETURN t.id, m.technician, m.status
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'London'})<-[:DEPARTS_FROM]-(j:Journey)-[:ARRIVES_AT]->(e:Station {name: 'Edinburgh'}) MATCH (j)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket) RETURN j.departureTime, avg(t.price)
MATCH (r:Route)-[:HAS_LOG]->(l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE l.date STARTS WITH '2024-02' RETURN r.name, sum(l.passengerCount) AS monthlyTotal
MATCH (p:Platform)-[:PART_OF]->(s:Station) WHERE NOT (p)<-[:STOPS_AT]-() RETURN s.name, p.number
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Bristol'})<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) MATCH (t)-[:HAS_INCIDENT]->(i:Incident) MATCH (t)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) RETURN r.name, count(i) AS trainIncidents
MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE ts.totalRevenue > 10000 WITH ts MATCH (r:Route {id: ts.routeId}) MATCH (r)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) RETURN r.name, ts.totalRevenue, count(i) AS disruptions
MATCH (s:Station) RETURN count(s)
MATCH (t:Train {id: 'T100'}) SET t.lastServiceDate = '2026-03-20' RETURN t
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.timestamp < '2024-01-01' DELETE m
MATCH (p:Passenger {name: 'John Doe'})-[:HAS_CARD]->(c:TravelCard) RETURN c.id, c.expiryDate
MATCH (r:Route {name: 'South Line'})-[:CONSISTS_OF]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name ORDER BY s.sequenceNumber ASC
MATCH (st:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(p:Platform)-[:PART_OF]->(s:Station {name: 'Victoria'}) RETURN st.name, st.role
MATCH (t:Ticket) WHERE t.price > 150 AND t.class = 'First' RETURN count(t)
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE i.id = 'INC-99' SET i.status = 'Resolved' RETURN i
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route {id: 'R1'}) RETURN j.id, j.departureTime
MATCH (d:Depot)<-[:STATIONED_AT]-(t:Train) RETURN d.name, count(t) AS totalTrains
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.date = '2026-03-24' RETURN p.name, t.seatNumber
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) WHERE r.name = 'SkyLink' RETURN DISTINCT s.name
MATCH (l:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDS_FOR]->(s:Station) WHERE l.date = '2026-03-23' RETURN s.name, l.passengerCount
MATCH (ts:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE ts.totalRevenue > 50000 RETURN ts.routeId, ts.month
MATCH (t:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) RETURN t.id, sum(m.cost) AS totalMaintenanceCost
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, count(t) AS volume WHERE volume > 10 RETURN p.id, p.name, volume
MATCH (s:Station)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) WHERE p.isAccessible = false RETURN s.name, p.number
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:ARRIVES_AT]->(s:Station {name: 'Glasgow'}) MATCH (j)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket) RETURN avg(t.price) AS averagePrice
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:FOLLOWS]-(t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH s, count(DISTINCT r) AS routeCount WHERE routeCount > 3 RETURN s.name, routeCount
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) MATCH (r)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) RETURN i.description, count(j) AS affectedJourneys
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HAS_CARD]->(c:TravelCard) WHERE c.balance < 10.0 MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN p.name, t.id
MATCH (st:StaffMember)-[:MANAGES]->(d:Depot) MATCH (d)<-[:STATIONED_AT]-(t:Train) RETURN st.name, count(t) AS managedFleetSize
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE s.category = 'Major Hub' RETURN t.id, collect(s.name) AS hubsVisited
MATCH (j:Journey) WHERE j.delayMinutes > 15 MATCH (j)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket) RETURN sum(t.price) AS revenueAtRisk
MATCH (p:Passenger) WHERE p.membershipLevel = 'Platinum' MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN p.name, avg(t.price) AS avgTicketPrice
MATCH (r:Route) OPTIONAL MATCH (r)-[:HAS_INCIDENT]->(i:Incident) RETURN r.name, count(i) AS totalIncidents ORDER BY totalIncidents DESC
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE t.capacity < 200 MATCH (t)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) RETURN t.id, m.details
MATCH (s1:Station)-[:DEPARTS_FROM]-(j:Journey)-[:ARRIVES_AT]->(s2:Station) RETURN s1.name, s2.name, count(j) AS frequency
MATCH (l:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDS_FOR]->(s:Station) WITH s, avg(l.passengerCount) AS avgPax WHERE avgPax > 1000 RETURN s.name, avgPax
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, sum(t.price) AS totalSpend ORDER BY totalSpend DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN p.name, totalSpend
MATCH (r:Route)-[:HAS_LOG]->(l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE l.date STARTS WITH '2026' RETURN r.name, sum(l.passengerCount) AS annualTotal
MATCH (t:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.status = 'In Progress' RETURN t.id, m.technicianName
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Birmingham'})<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) RETURN r.name, count(t) AS trainCount
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HAS_CARD]->(c:TravelCard) WHERE c.type = 'Senior' MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN count(t) AS seniorTicketsSold
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(t:Train) MATCH (t)-[:BASED_AT]->(d:Depot) RETURN j.id, d.name
MATCH (i:Incident) WHERE i.severity = 'Critical' MATCH (i)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) MATCH (r)-[:SUMMARY]->(s:TicketSalesSummary) RETURN i.description, s.totalRevenue
MATCH (st:StaffMember) WHERE st.yearsOfService > 20 MATCH (st)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(p:Platform) RETURN st.name, p.id
MATCH (t:Train) WHERE NOT (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(:Station {name: 'London'}) RETURN t.id, t.model
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) WHERE r.name = 'East Coast' RETURN DISTINCT p.email
MATCH (d:Depot) MATCH (d)<-[:STATIONED_AT]-(t:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) RETURN d.name, avg(m.cost) AS avgMaintenanceByDepot
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.capacity > 5000 RETURN s.name, s.location
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 'P999'})-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) SET t.status = 'Used' RETURN t
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CONSISTS_OF]->(s:Station) WHERE s.name = 'Oxford' RETURN r.name, r.type
MATCH (st:StaffMember {id: 'S42'})-[:WORKS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name, st.shiftStart
MATCH (t:Train)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) WHERE r.name = 'Northern Line' RETURN count(t) AS activeTrains
MATCH (i:Incident {id: 'INC-202'})-[:AFFECTED]->(p:Platform) RETURN p.number, p.status
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:HAS_INCIDENT]->(i:Incident) WHERE j.date = '2026-03-24' RETURN j.id, i.severity
MATCH (t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey {id: 'J555'}) RETURN count(t) AS passengerCount
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HAS_CARD]->(c:TravelCard) WHERE c.status = 'Suspended' RETURN p.name, p.phone
MATCH (d:Depot)-[:HAS_STAFF]->(st:StaffMember) WHERE st.role = 'Engineer' RETURN d.name, st.name
MATCH (s:Station)-[:HAS_DAILY_LOG]->(l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE l.passengerCount > 20000 RETURN s.name, l.date
MATCH (t:Train)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.type = 'Safety Check' RETURN t.id, m.date
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) WHERE j.delayMinutes > 30 RETURN r.name, avg(j.delayMinutes)
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WHERE t.paymentMethod = 'Contactless' RETURN count(t)
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'Leeds'})-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) MATCH (p)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) RETURN DISTINCT t.id
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog)-[:PERFORMED_BY]->(st:StaffMember) WHERE st.name = 'Robert Brown' RETURN m.details, m.date
MATCH (t:TicketSalesSummary)-[:REPORTED_FOR]->(r:Route) WHERE t.totalTicketsSold < 100 RETURN r.name, t.totalTicketsSold
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:OPERATED_BY]->(t:Train {model: 'Electric Sprinter'}) RETURN j.id, j.departureTime
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) MATCH (t)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.destination = 'York' RETURN p.name
MATCH (r:Route)-[:AFFECTED_BY]->(i:Incident) WITH r, count(i) AS incidentFreq WHERE incidentFreq > 5 RETURN r.name, incidentFreq
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train) WITH s, collect(t.id) AS trainList WHERE size(trainList) > 20 RETURN s.name, size(trainList)
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HAS_CARD]->(c:TravelCard) WHERE c.expiryDate < '2026-04-01' RETURN p.email, c.id
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) MATCH (t)-[:HAS_MAINTENANCE]->(m:MaintenanceLog) RETURN s.name, count(m) AS maintenanceCount
MATCH (j:Journey)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket) WHERE t.price < 5.0 RETURN j.id, count(t) AS budgetCommuters
MATCH (st:StaffMember)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot) MATCH (d)<-[:STATIONED_AT]-(t:Train) WHERE t.status = 'Out of Service' RETURN st.name, t.id
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) MATCH (r)-[:HAS_LOG]->(l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE i.timestamp = l.date RETURN r.name, l.passengerCount
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket)-[:FOR_JOURNEY]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.cancelled = true RETURN p.name, t.id
MATCH (s:Station)-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_INCIDENT]->(i:Incident) RETURN s.name, p.number, i.description
MATCH (t:Train)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) WITH r, count(t) AS trainDensity ORDER BY trainDensity DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN r.name, trainDensity
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, sum(t.price) AS lifetimeValue WHERE lifetimeValue > 1000 RETURN p.id, lifetimeValue
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:ON_ROUTE]->(r:Route) MATCH (j)<-[:FOR_JOURNEY]-(t:Ticket) RETURN r.name, sum(t.price) AS totalRouteRevenue
MATCH (st:StaffMember) WHERE st.certification = 'High Speed' MATCH (st)-[:OPERATES]->(t:Train) RETURN st.name, t.id
MATCH (m:MaintenanceLog) WHERE m.cost > 5000 MATCH (m)-[:FOR_TRAIN]->(t:Train) RETURN t.model, m.details
MATCH (s1:Station {name: 'Liverpool'})-[:DEPARTS_FROM]-(j:Journey)-[:ARRIVES_AT]->(s2:Station) RETURN s2.name, count(j) AS journeyCount
MATCH (l:DailyPassengerLog) WHERE l.passengerCount < l.averageCapacity MATCH (l)-[:RECORDS_FOR]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name, l.date
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE s.isUnderConstruction = true RETURN t.id, s.name
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:HAS_CARD]->(c:TravelCard) MATCH (c)-[:USED_ON]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.id = 'J101' RETURN p.name
MATCH (r:Route)-[:CROSSES_REGION]->(reg:Region {name: 'Midlands'}) MATCH (r)<-[:ON_ROUTE]-(j:Journey) RETURN count(j)
MATCH (t:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE t.month = '2026-02' WITH t ORDER BY t.totalRevenue DESC LIMIT 1 MATCH (r:Route {id: t.routeId}) RETURN r.name
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE NOT (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(:Train {status: 'Active'}) RETURN s.name, s.status
